### TC-CON-001: UAT — AC-1: the contact exists once and can be related to multiple accounts and locations

| Field | Value |

| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |

**Preconditions:**
- UAT environment seeded with anonymised business data.
- Business user briefed on the scenario.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Setup: a Fusion contact supports multiple sites in Fusion | Test scenario state is ready |
| 2 | Perform: the contact is synced to D365 | Action executes |
| 3 | Validate: the contact exists once and can be related to multiple accounts and locations | Outcome matches business expectation |

**Post-conditions:**
- Business user confirms outcome meets the operational requirement.

**Test Data:**
- Anonymised PII; representative master-data volumes.

**Notes:**
UAT sign-off is required per §7 Exit Criteria of the test plan.
